## Summary

One-paragraph description of what this PR does.

## Related issue

Fixes #NNN or Relates to #NNN. If there's no issue, explain why this change is being made.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality changes in a way users will notice)
- [ ] Documentation update

## User-facing impact

If this changes any of the following, call it out explicitly:

- Container labels (`docknap.*`)
- Environment variables (`DOCKNAP_*`)
- Endpoints (`/_docknap/*`)
- Metric names or labels (`docknap_*`)

## Testing

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe below)

### Manual testing

What did you test? How? On what setup?

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style (`gofmt -s` is clean)
- [ ] I have added tests for new behavior, or explained why no tests are needed
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG if user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
